legacy.content:
# Phase 36-01 Summary: Local policy-agent regression
## Completed
1. Browser playthrough runner now accepts explicit local policy selection (`policyId`). 2. Space Explorer exposes policy selection for non-MCP report generation. 3. Regression path remains deterministic and replay-compatible.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:unit` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:e2e` passed.
